🌐 Browser (Easiest)

Don't add the SIP credential as a "user / extension" — a PBX answers the call and dumps it straight to its own voicemail (you'll hear "Record your message and press pound, or press star to contact the operator", then "transfer failed" on star). Configure it as a SIP TRUNK instead:
Make & receive calls directly in your browser:
1.speechcue.com/call

📱 Softphone Apps — Recommended

• Linphone — iOS / Android / Mac / Windows / Linux (free)
• Zoiper — iOS / Android / Desktop (free)
• MicroSIP — Windows (free, lightweight)
• Bria Solo — paid, polished UI

1. Install the app
2. Add Account → SIP / VoIP
3. Username + Password from 🔑 SIP Credentials
4. Domain / SIP Server: sip.speechcue.com
5. Port 5060 (UDP/TCP) or 5061 (TLS) · DTMF: RFC 2833 · Codec: G.711μ
